channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Trump, Musk say media trying to drive them apart
item.description: President Trump and Elon Musk, one of his top allies, argued that the mainstream media is trying to drive a wedge between them and stymie the president's agenda.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Duffy: FAA firings fewer than 400 out of ‘staggering’ 45,000 staffers
item.description: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy seemingly defended the recent firings at the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) on Monday, arguing that the probationary employees who were let go made up only a minor portion of the workforce. “Here’s the truth: the FAA alone has a staggering 45,000 employees.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stephen Miller: DOGE will restore 'faith and confidence' in IRS
item.description: White House deputy chief of staff Stephen Miller said Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) will restore “faith and confidence” in the Internal Revenue Service (IRS).
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: How to keep AI hallucinations out of your code
item.description: It turns out androids do dream, and their dreams are often strange. In the early days of generative AI, we got human hands with eight fingers and recipes for making pizza sauce from glue. Now, developers working with AI-assisted coding tools are also finding AI hallucinations in their code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI board unanimously rejects Elon Musk's $97.4 billion proposal
item.description: OpenAI says its board of directors has unanimously rejected a $97.4 billion takeover bid by Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Italian government denies it spied on journalists and migrant activists using Paragon spyware
item.description: ROME (AP) — The Italian government denied Wednesday that it had spied on journalists and migrant activists using spyware but said it would cooperate with an investigation into “vulnerabilities” after at least seven Italian cellphones were apparently hacked with military-grade surveillance technology
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD and PAOLO SANTALUCIA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thomson Reuters scores early win in AI copyright battles in the US
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thomson Reuters has won an early battle in court over the question of fair use in artificial intelligence-related copyright cases.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Rise of AI-Powered Romance Scams: Protecting Yourself in the Digital Dating Landscape
item.description: Discover how convincing AI technologies are increasingly targeting mature online daters, and learn expert-approved ways to spot and prevent sophisticated AI-driven romance scams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Keep your code open to possibilities
item.description: I’ve been developing software for many years now. Decades. I’ve learned a lot along the way, and I dare to think that I’ve collected some wisdom about software development worth sharing with others. At some point, you think “Yeah, I’ve got a grip on this thing.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Rust memory management explained
item.description: The Rust programming language shares many concepts with other languages intended for systems programming. For instance, Rust distinguishes between memory allocated from the stack and memory allocated from the heap.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Reset what you see on social media
item.description: Here's how to take control of the algorithms on Facebook, YouTube, Instagram and TikTok if your social media feeds aren't showing you content you want to see.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cisco doubles down on AI with new, updated certifications
item.description: Cisco this week furthered its commitment to help customers support and develop artificial intelligence systems by rolling out new certification and training courses aimed at teaching professionals everything from how to incorporate AI into specific roles to advanced networking design.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Why the Trump administration should uphold this final cyber executive order
item.description: Ilona Cohen, the chief legal and policy officer at HackerOne, explains why President Joe Biden’s new cyber executive order should be a priority. The post Why the Trump administration should uphold this final cyber executive order first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — The first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027, two years later than expected when a 12-year deal with Saudi Arabia was signed last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, Fox 5
